features: This Elliott Recycled Glass Spray Bottles are an ideal everyday gadget to have around the home, Ideal for using with homemade cleaning solutions, Watering plants or use with laundry tasks
This bottle has spray settings to aid the type use required and can be a mist or a more pressured spray, The spray mechanism is made from recycled Plastic
The glass used for this bottle is recycled and an environmentally friendly and sustainable choice, highly durable and long lasting
Each bottles holds up to 480ml and the perfect size for cleaning tasks
From an extensive range of Cleaning products from Elliott
description: Product Description This Elliott Recycled Glass Spray Bottle is an ideal bottle for use around the home and perfect for use for homemade Cleaning Solutions, Watering Plants or for use with laundry, This bottle holds up to 480ml and has an adjustable trigger Ingredients Recycled Glass
